steps.title: Use the horizontal line
steps.content: The second equation gives $y=28$. Substitute $28$ into $y=12x-20$: $$28=12x-20.$$

steps.title: Solve for $x$
steps.content: Add $20$: $48=12x$. Divide by $12$: $x=4$. So the solution is $(4,28)$.

steps.title: Check the choices
steps.content: The solution is $(4,28)$. Reversing the coordinates or using an incorrect $x$-value does not satisfy both equations, so A is correct.
